documentation.text:
@title SignalRegistry
 @notice Immutable on-chain attestation ledger for AI trading signals.
  Commit-Reveal Flow:
  1. Agent calls commitSignal(hash, expiration) — hash, agent wallet, and
     block timestamp are stored immutably. This binds the agent to a specific
     prediction before the market moves.
  2. Agent calls revealSignal(id, rawPayload, salt) before expiration —
     contract verifies keccak256(rawPayload ++ salt) == storedHash and marks
     the signal as revealed. The payload is now auditable on-chain.
  No stake, no settlement, no keeper required — verification is purely
  cryptographic. Off-chain components handle scoring and settlement.

"commitSignal","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"signalId","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"agent","type":"address"}],"name":"getAgentSignalCount","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"agent","type":"address"}],"name":"getAgentSignalIds","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256[]","name":"","type":"uint256[]"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"id","type":"uint256"}],"name":"getSignal","outputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"hash","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"address","name":"agent","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"committedAt","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"expiration","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bool","name":"revealed","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"hashCommitted","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"nextSignalId","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"onChainId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"string","name":"rawPayload","type":"string"},{"internalType":"string","name":"salt","type":"string"}],"name":"revealSignal","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{"commitSignal(bytes32,uint256)":{"params":{"expiration":"Unix timestamp when the prediction resolves.","hash":"Cryptographic commitment binding the agent to a prediction."},"returns":{"signalId":"  Auto-incremented ID for this signal."}},"getSignal(uint256)":{"returns":{"agent":"      The agent wallet that committed.","committedAt":"Block timestamp when committed.","expiration":" Unix timestamp when the prediction resolves.","hash":"       The committed hash.","revealed":"   True once revealSignal has been called successfully."}},"revealSignal(uint256,string,string)":{"params":{"onChainId":"The ID returned by commitSignal.","rawPayload":"The original signal data (e.g. JSON with asset/direction/price).","salt":"Random salt used during the original keccak256 hash."}}},"title":"SignalRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"commitSignal(bytes32,uint256)":{"notice":"Commit a signal hash on-chain. The hash must be         keccak256(abi.encodePacked(rawPayload, salt))."},"getSignal(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns the stored commit record for a signal."},"revealSignal(uint256,string,string)":{"notice":"Reveal the signal payload. Must be called by the committing agent         before the expiration timestamp."}},"notice":"Immutable on-chain attestation ledger for AI trading signals.  Commit-Reveal Flow:  1. Agent calls commitSignal(hash, expiration) \u2014 hash, agent wallet, and     block timestamp are stored immutably. This binds the agent to a specific     prediction before the market moves.  2. Agent calls revealSignal(id, rawPayload, salt) before expiration \u2014     contract verifies keccak256(rawPayload ++ salt) == storedHash and marks     the signal as revealed. The payload is now auditable on-chain.  No stake, no settlement, no keeper required \u2014 verification is purely  cryptographic. Off-chain components handle scoring and settlement.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/SignalRegistry.sol":"SignalRegistry"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/SignalRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7c0900abb2620f4e8c5c437ab17a1094bbeb5314af8bfe755f6e1336caf86901","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://427824fee3c455f17350a61ba65bb0bbb6649fc0f402912d83988043a28dd024","dweb:/ipfs/QmV9URPGyJACmiGaCQVhgyZwWHH8XzBzEsz6wud6wRsiVN"]}},"version":1}
